'''Threld''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] who served as a bridge officer on the [[Indomitable (Majestic-class)|''Indomitable'']] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. During the [[Battle of ILC-905]], he took over at the first officer's duty station when [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Theb Tobbra]] was relegated to his quarters.<ref name="Tyrant's Test">''[[Tyrant's Test]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
